name: Elves
description: Elves begin as Fighting-Men or Magic-Users and choose freshly which to be at the start of each adventure — never mid-game — enjoying both classes' benefits: weapons and spells together, magic armor worn without silencing their magic. Hero caps the sword, Warlock the spell. Keen eyes for secret and hidden doors; the fantastic-foe advantages of the source combat rules; and the tongues of Orcs, Hobgoblins, and Gnolls beside Elvish and the usual.
special_notes: class choice per adventure (ir-a8: race + class-choice feature)
